items.q: Deglazing lifts fond from a pan with liquid.
items.explanation: This is a standard hospitality and kitchen principle.

items.q: Hollandaise is a tomato-based mother sauce.

items.explanation: Hospitality training commonly defines this as tough texture.

items.a: Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points

items.q: What culinary term or concept matches: deglazing means?
items.a: adding liquid to lift browned bits from pan
